states.name: Haku
states.title: Sacred Deer Onmyoji
states.description: If you happen to hear a noise in the woods after dark, and catch a glimpse of a girl surrounded by soft white glow, that would be Haku Urushido. Her aura alone can separate darkness from light; her brush draws the line between this life and the next one. And her smile can cleanse whatever impurity dwells in your heart.

states.name: Haku
states.title: Sacred Deer Onmyoji
states.description:
She likes peace and quiet.
She likes reading.
This place, bathed in sunlight, filled with the scent of tea, is like a sanctum of sorts. When she sits here, engrossed in her books, no-one dares interrupt her, but if you take a look every now and then, you may see her blushing. Because the books she prefers are all about love.

states.name: Haku
states.title: Sacred Deer Onmyoji
states.description:
How strong must a feeling be to turn a waterfall crimson? She tries to envision this feeling whenever she chooses to be alone among nature.
Once the girl in love with love actually falls for someone, the waterfalls, rivers and mountains will surely all turn red for her.
